name: PhilateLister stamp catalog
author: Exergy ∞ LLC
description: Entity shard: Scott catalog major section prefix (letter or letter pair before the number).

entities.name: scott_catalog_section
entities.brief: Scott Standard / Specialized catalog section identified by number prefix.
entities.description: Each Scott-listed stamp number begins with a section prefix (e.g. B for semi-postal, RW for hunting permits). One row per prefix; use for filtering, UI labels, and matching catalog numbers.

field_definitions.name: scott_catalog_section_prefix
field_definitions.description: Scott major-section letter or letter pair before the catalog numeral (values seeded in this model).

fields.name: section_prefix
fields.description: Scott catalog number prefix as printed before the numeral (e.g. B, C, QE, RW).

fields.name: description
fields.description: What stamps in this section represent and how they differ from regular postage.

fields.name: sort_order
fields.description: Optional display order in reference lists (lower first).
